title: Understanding the Value of Time in Wealth

segments.text: Time is the most undervalued asset in wealth.
And this next insight is crucial.
Wealthy individuals invest in time, not just money.
They leverage every minute toward their goals.
That's how they build wealth, one minute at a time.
Follow for the money mindset they never taught you.

description: Time can be your greatest ally in wealth creation. Follow for the money mindset they never taught you. ⏳
